title: acalypha websteri
intro: Acalypha websteri is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Webster's cotton bush. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of saponins and alkaloids. Acalypha websteri is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and has been used in herbal remedies to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and wound infections.
